title: Reducing Parental Conflict Challenge Fund: final learning report March 2025
body: "Through the Reducing Parental Conflict Challenge Fund, eight organisations received grant funding to test what works to reduce parental conflict. It aimed to fill evidence gaps in two strands of delivery: universal digital support mechanisms for families (Digital Support) and support for a diverse range of families who may have additional stressors for conflict. Each project had specific aims and target groups.  This report collates and analyses the learning gathered by funded organisations during the delivery of the projects between June 2023 and November 2024.  Find more information about Reducing Parental Conflict: innovative projects delivered to support families in conflict . "
